Field Notes Use Cases Guides News About

About This Project

A Practitioner's Working Notebook

IA Field Notes is an independent editorial site focused on practical AI adoption. It documents real observations from embedding AI tools — particularly GitHub Copilot and Microsoft's AI ecosystem — into daily professional work.

What This Is

  • 📓 Field notes from daily AI-assisted work
  • 🎯 Structured use case breakdowns
  • 📋 Step-by-step workflow guides
  • 💬 Tested prompt patterns
  • 📡 Timely analysis of AI updates

What This Isn't

This isn't a product blog, marketing site, or official documentation. It's one practitioner's honest observations — including what doesn't work, what's overhyped, and what's genuinely useful. Think of it as lab notes, not press releases.

The Approach

Every piece follows a consistent structure: observation, context, assessment. Field notes are timestamped with ISO week notation and categorized by topic. The goal is content that remains useful six months from now — not hot takes that expire in six days.

Independent practitioner notes. Not official Microsoft guidance.

IA Field Notes

Intelligence, amplified

Not an official Microsoft resource. Views represent personal perspective from work in the field. Nothing here is sponsored, endorsed, or reviewed by any vendor.
